data.name: DownloadUpdate
data.value: Downloads an update file for a specified application, given an API key and the application name, by checking for the file in the server and returning it as a file stream

data.name: UploadUpdate
data.value: Uploads a new version of an application by accepting a file, an API key, the name of the application, and a version number, and then saves the file to the server and updates the version information in the database before returning a success message

data.name: GetAudioWaveform
data.value: Returns an audio waveform image for a specified audio file, given an API key and a file key, by first retrieving the file from the server and then generating the waveform image using NAudioTools library

data.name: GetFFmpegPath
data.value: Returns the path to the FFmpeg executable, given an API key, by calling the General.GetFFmpegPath method and returning the result in the response

data.name: CutMedia
data.value: Cuts a media file and returns the resulting file, given an API key, a start time in milliseconds, and an end time in milliseconds, by first retrieving the input file from the request and then using FFmpeg to create a new media file with the specified start and end times

data.name: ConvertMedia
data.value: Converts a media file to a specified media type and returns the resulting file, given an API key and a MediaType enum value, by first retrieving the input file from the request and then using FFmpeg or ImageTools to create a new media file with the specified media type

data.name: fileByToken
data.value: Returns a file as a stream, given a file key and a token, by first checking the database for the file record and user authentication, and then returning the file as a stream if it exists on disk and the user is authorized

data.name: getYoutubeQuality
data.value: Returns a list of available video quality options for a given YouTube URL, given the URL and an authentication token, by first checking user authentication and then using the YouTube DL library to fetch the video data and return a list of available quality options

data.name: addFile
data.value: Accepts a file upload and an authentication token, saves the file to the server and creates a corresponding DbFile object in the database, and then returns a success message

data.name: uploadTemporaryImageFile
data.value: Uploads a temporary image file for the user with the specified API key, saves it to a temporary location, and returns the unique file key and ID

data.name: GetPermissions
data.value: Retrieves the list of privileged methods and their corresponding information, and sends it to the client associated with the provided token

data.name: GetUsers
data.value: Retrieves a list of all users from the database and sends it to the client with the specified user ID and token

data.name: DeleteUser
data.value: Deletes the user with the specified removeID from the database if the user with userID has sufficient privileges and is not attempting to delete themselves. Sends a list of all users in the database to all clients

data.name: GenerateApiKey
data.value: Generates a new API key for the user with the specified token and returns the updated user data

data.name: ReloadDownloadConfig
data.value: Reloads the download configuration and sends a dialog message to the caller with the result

data.name: GetAllDownloads
data.value: Retrieves a list of all downloads from the database and sends it to the client with the specified token

data.name: GetStorageInfo
data.value: Retrieves information about the file storage locations and sends it to the client with the specified token

data.name: PrivateChat
data.value: Initiates a private chat by allowing a user, identified by a token, to send a message to another user specified by their ID. After validating the existence of both the sender and the receiver, the method creates and stores the conversation in the database. Upon successful message dispatch, the sender is notified with a success message. Simultaneously, the receiver is informed about the new message and the sender's username.

data.name: PublicAnnouncement
data.value: Broadcasts a server announcement to all clients except the sender, characterized by a specific alert type. The announcement contains a message and presents the user with a single acknowledgment option, "Ok".

data.name: CleanUpFiles
data.value: Cleans up files from the file system and/or displays a list of files that would be removed, based on the delete parameter, and sends the result to the client with the specified token

data.name: SetUserPrivileges
data.value: Allows a user, identified by a token and user ID, to modify the privileges of another user. The method checks for valid authorization, ensuring that the user making the change has higher privileges than the target user and is not trying to modify their own privileges. Upon successful privilege change, a list of updated users is sent to all clients.

data.name: ApproveUser
data.value: Allows an administrative user to approve or disapprove another user's account. The method checks for valid authorization and ensures the caller has higher or equivalent elevated privileges but not equal to the target user. If the target user's privileges are "NotApproved" and the action is to approve, their privileges are updated to "Approved". If the target is being disapproved, their privileges revert to "NotApproved". Any attempt to modify one's own approval status or unauthorized access results in an error message to the caller. After any changes, a list of all users is sent to all clients.

data.name: JoinWebRtcStream
data.value: Allows the user to join an existing WebRTC stream. If there's no active streamer in the specified room, the method simply returns.

data.name: StartWebRtcStream
data.value: Allows a user to start a WebRTC stream in a specific room using a provided token and room ID. If there's already an active streamer in the room, the previous stream will be stopped before the new one begins.

data.name: SendOfferToViewer
data.value: Transmits a WebRTC client offer to a viewer specified by their connection ID. This is achieved using the token of an approved user.

data.name: StopWebRtcStream
data.value: Stops the current WebRTC stream in a particular room. The method will only work if the caller is the one currently streaming in the provided room.

data.name: CreateStreamAnswer
data.value: Generates a response to a WebRTC client offer, and sends it to the current streamer in a specific room. The method assumes the caller is a viewer and not the current streamer.

data.name: SendIceCandidate
data.value: Forwards a WebRTC ICE candidate to the current streamer in the specified room. The method ensures the caller is a viewer and not the streamer.

data.name: SendIceCandidateToViewer
data.value: Dispatches a WebRTC ICE candidate directly to a viewer identified by their connection ID. The operation is authorized using an approved user token.

data.name: ChangeDownload
data.value: Changes the name of the file with the specified file ID, validates the new name to be at least 3 characters long, and sends the updated file list to the client with the specified token

data.name: GetDownloads
data.value: Retrieves all files uploaded by the user with the specified token from the database, converts them to DTOs, sorts them by name, and sends them to the client

data.name: GetFolders
data.value: Retrieves all folders that belong to the user with the specified token, including folders shared with them, and sends the requested folder to the client

data.name: AddFolder
data.value: Creates a new folder with the name "New Folder" as a child of the folder with the specified ID, if the requesting user has the necessary privileges, and sends the updated list of folders to the client

data.name: DeleteFolder
data.value: Deletes the folder with the specified ID and all its contents, if it is owned by the requesting user or the user has administrator privileges, and sends the updated list of folders to the client

data.name: DownloadFile
data.value: Adds a file download to the manager with the specified URL, file name, and conversion preset, and authorized with the specified token if the user has Administrator privileges

data.name: DownloadYtVideo
data.value: Downloads a YouTube video or playlist with the specified URL and quality, and authorized with the specified token if the user has Administrator privileges. If it is a playlist, it downloads all the videos and adds them to the download manager

data.name: GetFileInfo
data.value: Gets the media information of the file with the specified ID, including video and audio streams, size, checksum, and creation time, and sends it to the client with the specified token

data.name: ShareFolder
data.value: Shares the folder with the specified folder ID with the user with the specified user ID, and sends the updated folder list to the user with the specified token

data.name: GetFolderFiles
data.value: Retrieves the files from the folder with the specified folder ID, checks the user's privileges, and sends the file list to the client with the specified token

data.name: ChangeFolderName
data.value: Changes the name of the folder with the specified folder ID to the specified folder name and sends the updated folder list to the client with the specified token

data.name: ChangeFolder
data.value: Changes the folder location of the file with the specified file ID to the folder with the specified folder ID

data.name: CancelConversion
data.value: Cancels the conversion process of the file with the specified download ID for the user associated with the specified token

data.name: RemoveFile
data.value: Removes the file with the specified ID from the file system and the database for the user associated with the specified token, and sends an update to the client to remove the file from the UI

data.name: MakeFilePermanent
data.value: Makes the temporary file with the specified ID permanent by removing its expiry date for the user associated with the specified token, and sends an update to the client to refresh the file list

data.name: ToggleFilePublic
data.value: Toggles the public status of the file with the specified ID for the user associated with the specified token, and sends an update to the client to refresh the file list

data.name: GetLiveUsers
data.value: Retrieves a list of all live users and sends it to the client with the specified token if the list is not empty

data.name: GetUsersWatching
data.value: Retrieves a list of all members watching a specific user and sends it to the client with the specified token and user name

data.name: GetWebRtcCredentials
data.value: Provides a set of temporary WebRTC credentials by generating them using the current configuration. The method returns these credentials with a successful HTTP status code.
